data.title: OneBalance to Shut Down OneApp and Legacy Infrastructure by July 1
data.description: OneBalance, a chain abstraction protocol, has announced the closure of its OneApp and associated legacy infrastructure. According to Foresight News, users are required to withdraw their funds by 7:59 on July 1, as operations will not be possible after this deadline. The official recommendation is for users to complete withdrawals as soon as possible to avoid any issues.

data.title: Zcash Foundation Urges Immediate Upgrade to Zebra Node Client 4.5.0
data.description:
Zcash Foundation has released version 4.5.0 of the Zebra node client, addressing multiple security vulnerabilities, including a critical consensus-level flaw. According to Foresight News, the foundation strongly recommends that all node operators upgrade immediately.

The most severe vulnerability (GHSA-gf9r-m956-97qx) involved the Rust script parser incorrectly counting signature operations in P2SH redemption scripts, causing Zebra to accept blocks rejected by zcashd, potentially leading to a chain split. Additionally, nine high to medium severity vulnerabilities were fixed, including issues related to block retry suppression, address balance overflow causing node crashes, mempool queue saturation, and sync restart poisoning. Three low-severity vulnerabilities were also addressed.

The new version also adds support for mining to shielded addresses. This update covers over 80 security reports received during the ZCG vulnerability disclosure program from April to May.

data.title: Evan Luthra Highlights NexFundAI's 19x Surge Amid Market Manipulation Sting
data.description: Evan Luthra reported that NexFundAI, an ERC-20 token created by the FBI for a market-manipulation sting, experienced a 19-fold increase following his post on X labeling it as fake. According to NS3.AI, Luthra noted that the original operation resulted in 18 indictments across the United States, United Kingdom, and Portugal, with $25 million seized in a single day. He emphasized that this incident illustrates how social media attention and automated trading systems can transform warnings into speculative opportunities.

data.title: Elon Musk Denies Reports of SpaceX IPO Valuation Reduction
data.description: Elon Musk has refuted claims on the X platform regarding SpaceX's initial public offering (IPO) valuation target being lowered to at least 1.8 trillion. According to Foresight News, Musk dismissed the reports, maintaining that the valuation target remains unchanged.

data.title: Potential $300 Billion Investment Fund for Iran Discussed in U.S.-Iran Memorandum
data.description: A draft memorandum between the U.S. and Iran is currently under discussion, which includes the possibility of establishing a $300 billion international investment fund for Iran. According to NS3.AI, some versions of the proposal also suggest framing it as a broader declaration to end the war, which would encompass ceasing hostilities within Lebanon. However, not all mediating parties have confirmed the $300 billion figure.

data.title: ECB's Radov Urges Timely Response to Inflation Risks Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description: European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council member Dimitar Radov has emphasized the importance of avoiding delays in addressing the aftermath of the conflict in Iran. According to Jin10, the Bulgarian central bank governor highlighted the risk of inflation expectations becoming unanchored, stating that the current trade-offs are not symmetrical. He noted that the cost of inaction could outweigh the cost of earlier intervention. With inflation rates significantly exceeding the 2% target due to the Middle East conflict, policymakers appear to be on the verge of the first interest rate hike since 2023. However, some officials advocate for observing the spillover effects before intervening, while others express concerns about the risks to economic growth.

data.title: U.S. May Chicago PMI Surpasses Expectations at 62.7
data.description: The U.S. Chicago Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) for May recorded a significant increase, reaching 62.7. According to Jin10, this figure exceeded the expected 50.5 and marked a notable rise from the previous value of 49.2. The PMI is a key indicator of economic health in the manufacturing sector, with a reading above 50 indicating expansion.

data.title: Polymarket to Restart CLOB API for Maintenance Fix
data.description: Polymarket has announced that its CLOB API is currently under maintenance, affecting trading functionalities. According to Odaily, the project team has identified the issue impacting CLOB trading and plans to restart the CLOB at 21:10 today to deploy a fix. During this period, there may be brief disruptions in order matching or limitations to order placement. Other services, including the website, Markets API, Polygon RPC, user authentication, and Sports API, will continue to operate normally.

data.title: Polymarket Experiences Partial Outage in Trading Functions
data.description: Polymarket has reported a partial outage affecting its trading functions. According to NS3.AI, the company has identified the cause of the issue and is currently deploying a fix to resolve the problem.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 73,000 USDT with a 0.24% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 29, 2026, 13:25 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 73,000 USDT and is now trading at 72,976.210938 USDT, with a narrowed 0.24% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: AI Computing Costs Decrease as Cryptocurrency Prices Rise
data.description: According to PANews, as cryptocurrency prices increase, the cost of AI inference decreases, leading to more computational power being dedicated to mining. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle.

data.title: EU's Six Major Economies Agree on Unified Capital Market Regulation Proposal
data.description: Germany's Finance Ministry announced that the six largest economies in the European Union—Germany, France, Italy, Poland, Spain, and the Netherlands—have reached a consensus on the European Commission's proposal for unified capital market regulation. According to Foresight News, the agreement aims to reduce cross-border fund barriers and assign the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) the primary regulatory role over major market infrastructures. Additionally, the proposal seeks to expand EU regulatory oversight of crypto asset trading. The European Commission introduced this proposal in December of last year, intending to shift capital market regulatory authority from individual member states to ESMA, based in Paris. The proposal still requires agreement from the remaining 21 member countries, with Germany's finance minister anticipating the complete package to be approved by the end of 2026.

data.title: Polymarket Team Addresses Trading Function Anomaly
data.description: The Polymarket development team has identified an issue affecting the current trading function. According to Odaily, the team has confirmed the cause of the problem and is working on deploying a fix. Users can check the official status page for real-time updates on the situation.

data.title: Bittensor Declines 4% Amid CoinDesk 20's 0.8% Drop
data.description: Bittensor experienced a 4% decline, according to CoinDesk Indices data, as the CoinDesk 20 index fell by 0.8% to 1975.1. Among the 20 assets in the index, three recorded gains.

data.title: Binance Wallet Introduces Event Rush Trading Feature
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X the introduction of a new trading feature called Event Rush, designed to enhance user engagement through interactive trading experiences. This feature is accessible via the Binance Wallet App, where users can navigate to the [Markets] section and explore the newly added [eMeme] tab.

To participate in Event Rush, users select an event and choose the corresponding Event Meme that aligns with their desired outcome. The platform allows users to enter the amount of USDT they wish to spend, offering quick-amount tags for convenience. The estimated tokens, associated fees, and potential winnings are calculated automatically, providing users with a clear overview before proceeding with their trades. Once users have reviewed the details, they can confirm their participation by tapping [Buy].

This new feature aims to provide a streamlined and engaging trading experience, allowing users to interact with market events in a novel way. By integrating Event Rush into the Binance Wallet App, Binance continues to expand its offerings, catering to diverse trading preferences and enhancing the overall user experience. The introduction of Event Rush reflects Binance's ongoing efforts to innovate within the digital asset space, offering users more dynamic and interactive ways to engage with the market.

data.title: Meta Stock Rises as Zuckerberg Considers Cloud Computing
data.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg recently stated that cloud computing is "definitely on the table" for the company. According to NS3.AI, this announcement has captured the attention of Wall Street, leading to an increase in Meta's stock price from $609 to $632.

data.title: Fed Governor Bowman: Current Policy Aims to Boost Employment and Reduce Inflation
data.description: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman stated that the Federal Reserve's current 'moderately tight' policy is designed to enhance employment and reduce inflation. According to Jin10, Bowman emphasized the importance of maintaining this policy stance to achieve the Fed's dual mandate of maximum employment and price stability. She noted that the current economic conditions require careful monitoring to ensure that inflation trends downward while supporting job growth.

data.title: Fed Governor Bowman Supports Maintaining Dovish Policy Stance
data.description: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman expressed her support for maintaining a dovish policy stance during the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) statement in April. According to Jin10, Bowman emphasized the importance of continuing accommodative measures to support economic recovery.

data.title: Fed Governor Bowman: Ongoing Energy Shocks to Pressure Inflation Later This Year
data.description: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman stated that ongoing energy shocks are expected to exert pressure on inflation later this year. According to Jin10, Bowman highlighted the potential impact of energy market disruptions on the inflation outlook, emphasizing the need for careful monitoring of these developments.

data.title: Dogecoin, BinanceLife, BUILDon at Key Technical Points in June 2026
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE), BinanceLife (币安人生), and BUILDon (B) are at critical technical junctures as June 2026 begins. DOGE, trading at $0.099, is testing a multi-month descending trendline after a prolonged downtrend, with potential targets at $0.147 and $0.22 if it breaks above. BinanceLife, priced at $0.4364, is forming a symmetrical pennant below $0.4639 resistance, indicating a possible bullish continuation. BUILDon, at $0.237, has retraced to the 0.236 Fibonacci level after hitting an all-time high of $0.772, with resistance at $0.324. According to BeInCrypto, these meme coins are poised for significant moves.
